query:
INSERT INTO menuItems (name, description, category, price, imageUrl, isAvailable, isTodaysSpecial) VALUES
('Chicken Shish Kebab Wrap', 'Grilled chicken with fresh vegetables in warm flatbread', 'Kebab', 1800, 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1529006557810-274b9b2fc783?w=400', true, false),
('Lamb Doner Wrap', 'Slow-cooked lamb with garlic sauce and pickles', 'Kebab', 1900, 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1599487488170-d11ec9c172f0?w=400', true, false),
('Chicken Momo (8 pcs)', 'Handcrafted dumplings with spiced chicken filling', 'Momo', 1600, 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1534422298391-e4f8c172dddb?w=400', true, false),
('Vegetable Momo (8 pcs)', 'Fresh vegetable dumplings with traditional spices', 'Momo', 1400, 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1496116218417-1a781b1c416c?w=400', true, false),
('Brown Sugar Bubble Tea', 'Classic milk tea with chewy tapioca pearls', 'Bubble Tea', 800, 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1525385133512-2f3bdd039054?w=400', true, false),
('Taro Bubble Tea', 'Creamy taro milk tea with boba', 'Bubble Tea', 800, 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558857563-b406f3e3b39c?w=400', true, false),
('Flat White', 'Double shot espresso with velvety microfoam', 'Coffee', 600, 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1509042239860-f550ce710b93?w=400', true, false),
('Long Black', 'Double espresso with hot water', 'Coffee', 500, 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1514432324607-a09d9b4aefdd?w=400', true, false);
